name: Davion Table Lamp - 16 Inch Height - TBL4128 - Brass - Safavieh
description:
Illuminate your space with the Davion Table Lamp, a piece that brings elegance and warmth to any room. Featuring a sleek brass finish, this lamp adds a touch of sophistication to your decor. Its chic yet straightforward design makes it a versatile addition to both modern and classic settings.

The Davion Table Lamp stands at an ideal height, providing ample lighting while complementing your furnishings. Perfect for a bedside table or a living room accent, this lamp enhances your environment with its understated charm. Its sturdy construction ensures it remains a staple in your home lighting collection. 

Enhance your evenings with the inviting glow of the Davion Table Lamp, a stylish choice for those who appreciate simplicity and beauty in every detail.
